notes: v0.24.2 — Lobby visual + mode-flow second pass. Centred ship trio back with compact module-icon row, class-signature animations (Shard dash / Bastion shield / Lance cloak / Chorus sound-waves), bullets clipped to ship card, ship+skin name labelled, Casual/Ranked toggle replaces difficulty chip for MP (Ranked SOON), Change Mode + PLAY top-nav both land on the same mosaic, practice → submode picker → back to lobby (no difficulty / start-match pages), pre-match ship picker removed (lobby owns it), panels reskinned with neon gradients (no more corner brackets), NEWS dates are real commit dates now.
